user.title: Bosch eBike
user.description: Which eBike system would you like to integrate?

credentials.title: Bosch eBike Setup
credentials.description:
Enter the **Client-ID** from your app registration in the [Bosch Data Act Portal]({portal_url}).

Depending on your system you register the app via a different login: **Smart System** with SingleKey ID, **eBike System 2** with the eBike Connect login.

After submitting you'll be sent to the Bosch login and returned to Home Assistant automatically. You then activate data sharing per bike in the Bosch eBike Manager.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Bosch eBike
reauth_confirm.description: Your Bosch login has expired. Click **Submit** to sign in again. Make sure your Client-ID is still active in the [Flow Portal]({portal_url}).

abort.oauth_error: Received invalid token data from Bosch.
abort.oauth_failed: Error while obtaining the access token from Bosch.
abort.oauth_timeout: Timed out resolving the OAuth token with Bosch.
abort.oauth_unauthorized: Bosch refused the token request (unauthorized). Is the Client-ID activated in the Flow Portal?
abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.no_url_available: No URL available for authorization. See the documentation for details.

bike.title: Live data sources for {bike_name} (optional)
bike.description: Optionally link the live odometer and battery state-of-charge sensors of this bike's own ESPHome Bosch eBike LDI bridge. Each bike on this account is configured separately, so two bikes never share the same bridge's values. When set, the integration uses these sensors to compute exact tour distance and battery consumption instead of cloud-derived estimates. Leave empty to keep the existing behavior for this bike.

data_description.live_odometer_entity: Sensor that exposes the bike's odometer in kilometers (e.g. sensor.ebike_odometer_live).
data_description.live_soc_entity: Sensor that exposes the bike's battery state of charge in percent (e.g. sensor.ebike_battery_soc_live).

add_maintenance.name: Add maintenance item
add_maintenance.description: Adds a new custom maintenance item for a bike (e.g. chain swap every 3000 km, inspection every 365 days). At least interval_km or interval_days must be provided.

bike_id.name: Bike ID
bike_id.description: ID of the bike (see attribute on bike sensors)

interval_km.name: Interval (km)
interval_km.description: After how many km to remind

interval_days.name: Interval (days)
interval_days.description: After how many days to remind

complete_maintenance.name: Mark maintenance item as done
complete_maintenance.description: Resets the counter for a maintenance item (date + odometer).
